cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Thomas could have gone to the football field. So, the idea is to find the time intervals when Thomas wasn't doing any of these activities. The football field was open until 9 pm, so he must have gone there sometime when he wasn't doing any of the listed activities. The field was closed after 9 pm, so he couldn't have gone after that. Now, let me look for the time gaps between these activities. From 8 am to 10 am: occupied From 10 am to 12 pm: occupied From 12 pm to 2 pm: occupied From 2 pm to 5 pm: occupied From 5 pm to 6 pm: not occupied From 6 pm to 9 pm: occupied So the only time interval when Thomas wasn't doing anything is from 5 pm to 6 pm. That's the only time when he could have gone to the football field. Let me double check. The options given are: (A) 12pm to 2pm - He was walking towards the Statue of Liberty, so not possible.
